lane: Lane 1 — unified tiled Q8_0 prefill owner, DEFINITIVE hardened measurement (v1+v2+v3)
host: win i7-11800H (8C/16T Tiger Lake, AVX-512 + AVX512-VNNI; RTX 3060 6GB hidden)
ubuntu_host: PENDING (Windows-only per Tim; promotion to default still needs both hosts)
method: camelid bench-owner-sweep: load model ONCE, measure 4 owner configs INTERLEAVED per round (env read per linear call -> no reload), 2 warmup + 8 measured rounds. owner-sweep-stats.mjs: per-round PAIRED ratios (cancels thermal drift) + bootstrap 95% CI; 'significant' iff CI excludes 1.0. CUDA hidden, greedy, ~516/530-tok prompt.
why_hardened: The cross-invocation A/B could NOT resolve the ~3% 4x8 effect (same config swung 0.897->1.044 across runs, ~10% noise) and wrongly called v3 a NULL. The in-process paired harness resolves it cleanly.
verdict: REPRODUCIBLE WIN, bit-exact. The full owner (4x8 VNNI, now default-on within the owner) lands +13.5% (3B) / +15.8% (4B) prefill over the shipping default -> 0.78x->0.89x (3B) and 0.67x->0.81x (4B) of llama.cpp. Every step significant (CI excludes 1.0). v3 (4x8) is a SIGNIFICANT +3.3%/+3.8% over v2, NOT a null -- the prior null was thermal noise the hardened paired harness eliminates. Owner stays default-off overall; promotion to default needs the Ubuntu host (both-host treaty).
supersedes: q8-prefill-owner-v3-4x8-20260628.json (the 'honest null' verdict, which was a measurement artifact).
next_v4: GotoBLAS 2D cache blocking + cross-projection single-quant (attn_norm 3x->1x, ffn_norm 2x->1x). Both bit-exact-preservable; now measurable via the hardened harness.
